must_fix_addressed: SearchService stale fallback when provider returns status=unavailable
useStockDetail Promise.all -> Promise.allSettled for partial failure isolation
should_consider_addressed: StockChart Korean candle color scheme (up=red, down=blue)
rejected: SearchService _load_lock per-category split (NIT, minimal benefit vs complexity)

implemented: search_service.py: get_detail/get_chart now check status=='unavailable' and serve stale cache when available
useStockDetail.ts: Promise.allSettled replaces Promise.all so chart failure does not block detail panel
StockDetailPanel.tsx: KRW prices rendered without decimal places
StockChart.tsx: Korean markets (kr_stock/kr_etf) use red for up, blue for down; PAD_LEFT increased to 72
SearchTab.tsx: passes category prop to StockChart
New backend tests for unavailable->stale fallback (detail and chart)
New frontend tests for KRW formatting and partial failure isolation
risks: Unavailable results are no longer cached, meaning every request during an outage hits the provider again - acceptable since outage recovery should be prompt
future_improvements: Per-category asyncio locks for parallel preload efficiency
Chart tooltip on hover (requires external chart library or more complex SVG interaction)
decisions: Used Promise.allSettled without adding chartError to StockDetailState - StockChart empty state already handles null chart data adequately
PAD_LEFT increased to 72 (NIT but co-located with Korean color changes, zero-risk change)
